_publications._publicationTitle: Whole exome sequencing reveals the maintained polyclonal nature from primary to metastatic malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor in two patients with NF1.

_contextSnippet: All three lines had varying levels of Trim23 expression. We specifically chose the line with the highest Trim23 expression for subsequent experiments
details: All three NPcis MPNST cell lines showed varying levels of Trim23 expression, with one line having the highest expression selected for experiments
